{{Culture of region | name = Culture of Japan | region = Japan <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's culture--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|Flag of Japan.svg}}} |size={{{imagesize|150px}}} |border=yes}}
| histoverride = Japanese history | histtopics = *[[Japanese era name|Era names]] *[[Demographics of Japan|Demographics]] *[[Japanese currency|Historical currency]] *[[Economic history of Japan|Economic history]] *[[History of education in Japan|Education]], [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science, and Technology]] *[[Health care system in Japan|Healthcare]] *[[Empire of Japan|Imperial history]] *[[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] *[[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] *[[Military history of Japan|Military history]] *[[Naval history of Japan|Naval history]] *[[Post-occupation Japan|Post-Japanese occupation history]]
| ethnooverride = Japanese people | ethnotopics = *[[Japanese people|Japanese]] *[[Koreans in Japan|Zainichi Koreans]] *[[Ainu people|Ainu]] *[[Ōbeikei Islanders]] *[[Yamato people|Yamato]] *[[Ryukyuan people|Ryukuyuans]]
| langoverride = Languages of Japan | langtopics = *[[Japonic languages|Japonic]] *[[Japanese language|Japanese]] *[[Ryukyuan languages|Ryukyuan]] *[[Hachijō language|Hachijō]] *[[Ainu languages|Ainu]] *[[Japanese writing system|Writing system]] *[[Japanese Sign Language]]
| tradoverride = Traditions | tradtopics = *[[Japanese clothing|Clothing]] *[[Etiquette in Japan|Etiquette]] *[[Japanese funeral|Funerals]] *[[List of traditional Japanese games|Games]] *[[Geisha]] *[[Wasōbon]] *[[Marriage in Japan|Marriage]] *[[Onsen]]{{\}}[[Sentō]] *[[Japanese tea ceremony|Tea ceremony]] *[[Japanese values|Values]]
| mythoverride = Japanese mythology | mythtopics = *[[List of Japanese deities|Deities]] *[[List of legendary creatures from Japan|Legendary creatures]] *[[Japanese urban legend|Urban legends]] *[[Japanese folktales|Folktales]]
| cuisoverride = Japanese cuisine | cuistopics = *[[History of Japanese cuisine|Food history]] *[[List of Japanese ingredients|Ingredients]] *[[List of Japanese dishes|Dishes]]
| festoverride = Japanese festivals | festtopics = *[[Bon (festival)|Obon]] *[[Coming of Age Day]] *[[Hinamatsuri]] *[[Buddha's Birthday]] *[[Tanabata]] *[[Shichi-Go-San]] *[[Cultural festival (Japan)|Cultural festivals]] *[[Japanese New Year]]
| reltopics = *[[Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] *[[Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] *[[Japanese new religions|New religions]] *[[Shinto]]
| artoverride = Japanese art | arttopics = *[[Bonsai]] *[[Japanese garden|Gardens]] *[[Ikebana]] *[[Japanese pottery and porcelain|Pottery and porcelain]]
| litoverride = Japanese literature | littopics = *[[Light novel]] *[[Manga]] *[[Japanese poetry|Poetry]]
| paoverride = Theatre of Japan | patopics = *[[J-pop]] *[[Anison]] *[[Kayōkyoku]] *[[Noh]]
| mediaoverride = Media of Japan | mediatopics = *[[Anime]] *[[Media mix]] *[[Japanese mobile phone culture|Mobile phone culture]] *[[Video games in Japan|Video games]] *[[Pornography in Japan|Pornography]]
| sporttopics = *[[Sumo in Japan|Sumo]] *[[Baseball in Japan|Baseball]] *[[Football in Japan|Association football]] *[[Japanese martial arts|Martial arts]] *[[Basketball in Japan|Basketball]] *[[Ice hockey in Japan|Ice hockey]] *[[American football in Japan|American football]] *[[Rugby union in Japan|Rugby union]] *[[Japan at the Olympics|Olympics]]
| monutopics = *[[Japanese architecture|Architecture]] *[[Cultural Landscape (Japan)|Cultural Landscapes]] *[[Cultural Property (Japan)|Cultural Properties]] *[[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures]]
| orgtopics = *[[Japanese museums|Museums]]

revision.text:
{{Culture of region | name = Culture of Japan | region = Japan <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's culture--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|Flag of Japan.svg}}} |size={{{imagesize|150px}}} |border=yes}}
| histoverride = Japanese history | histtopics = *[[Japanese era name|Era names]] *[[Demographics of Japan|Demographics]] *[[Japanese currency|Historical currency]] *[[Economic history of Japan|Economic history]] *[[History of education in Japan|Education]], [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science, and Technology]] *[[Health care system in Japan|Healthcare]] *[[Empire of Japan|Imperial history]] *[[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] *[[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] *[[Military history of Japan|Military history]] *[[Naval history of Japan|Naval history]] *[[Post-occupation Japan|Post-Japanese occupation history]]
| ethnooverride = Japanese people | ethnotopics = *[[Japanese people|Japanese]] *[[Koreans in Japan|Zainichi Koreans]] *[[Ainu people|Ainu]] *[[Ōbeikei Islanders]] *[[Yamato people|Yamato]] *[[Ryukyuan people|Ryukuyuans]]
| langoverride = Languages of Japan | langtopics = *[[Japonic languages|Japonic]] *[[Japanese language|Japanese]] *[[Ryukyuan languages|Ryukyuan]] *[[Hachijō language|Hachijō]] *[[Ainu languages|Ainu]] *[[Japanese writing system|Writing system]] *[[Japanese Sign Language]]
| tradoverride = Traditions | tradtopics = *[[Japanese clothing|Clothing]] *[[Etiquette in Japan|Etiquette]] *[[Japanese funeral|Funerals]] *[[List of traditional Japanese games|Games]] *[[Geisha]] *[[Wasōbon]] *[[Marriage in Japan|Marriage]] *[[Onsen]]{{\}}[[Sentō]] *[[Japanese tea ceremony|Tea ceremony]] *[[Japanese values|Values]]
| mythoverride = Japanese mythology | mythtopics = *[[List of Japanese deities|Deities]] *[[List of legendary creatures from Japan|Legendary creatures]] *[[Japanese urban legend|Urban legends]] *[[Japanese folktales|Folktales]]
| cuisoverride = Japanese cuisine | cuistopics = *[[History of Japanese cuisine|Food history]] *[[List of Japanese ingredients|Ingredients]] *[[List of Japanese dishes|Dishes]]
| festoverride = Japanese festivals | festtopics = *[[Bon (festival)|Obon]] *[[Coming of Age Day]] *[[Hinamatsuri]] *[[Buddha's Birthday]] *[[Tanabata]] *[[Shichi-Go-San]] *[[Cultural festival (Japan)|Cultural festivals]] *[[Japanese New Year]]
| reltopics = *[[Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] *[[Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] *[[Japanese new religions|New religions]] *[[Shinto]]
| artoverride = Japanese art | arttopics = *[[Bonsai]] *[[Japanese garden|Gardens]] *[[Ikebana]] *[[Japanese pottery and porcelain|Pottery and porcelain]]
| litoverride = Japanese literature | littopics = *[[Light novel]] *[[Manga]] *[[Japanese poetry|Poetry]]
| paoverride = Theatre of Japan | patopics = *[[J-pop]] *[[Anison]] *[[Kayōkyoku]] *[[Noh]]
| mediaoverride = Media of Japan | mediatopics = *[[Anime]] *[[Media mix]] *[[Japanese mobile phone culture|Mobile phone culture]] *[[Video games in Japan|Video games]] *[[Pornography in Japan|Pornography]]
| sporttopics = *[[Sumo in Japan|Sumo]] *[[Baseball in Japan|Baseball]] *[[Football in Japan|Association football]] *[[Japanese martial arts|Martial arts]] *[[Basketball in Japan|Basketball]] *[[Ice hockey in Japan|Ice hockey]] *[[American football in Japan|American football]] *[[Rugby union in Japan|Rugby union]] *[[Japan at the Olympics|Olympics]]
| monutopics = *[[Japanese architecture|Architecture]] *[[Cultural Landscape (Japan)|Cultural Landscapes]] *[[Cultural Property (Japan)|Cultural Properties]] *[[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures]]
| orgtopics = *[[Japanese museums|Museums]]
}}<noinclude> {{clear}}

</noinclude>

| histoverride = Japanese history | histtopics = *[[Japanese era name|Era names]] *[[:en:Demographics of Japan|Demographics]] *[[Japanese currency|Historical currency]] *[[:en:Economic history of Japan|Economic history]] *[[History of education in Japan|Education]], [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science, and Technology]] *[[Health care system in Japan|Healthcare]] *[[Empire of Japan|Imperial history]] *[[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] *[[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] *[[Military history of Japan|Military history]] *[[Naval history of Japan|Naval history]] *[[Post-occupation Japan|Post-Japanese occupation history]]
| ethnooverride = Japanese people | ethnotopics = *[[Japanese people|Japanese]] *[[Koreans in Japan|Zainichi Koreans]] *[[:en:Ainu people|Ainu]] *[[:en:Ōbeikei Islanders|Ōbeikei Islanders]] *[[Yamato people|Yamato]] *[[Ryukyuan people|Ryukuyuans]]

| histoverride = Japanese history | histtopics = *[[:en:Japanese era name|Era names]] *[[:en:Demographics of Japan|Demographics]] *[[:en:Japanese currency|Historical currency]] *[[:en:Economic history of Japan|Economic history]] *[[:en:History of education in Japan|Education]], [[:en:History of science and technology in Japan|Science, and Technology]] *[[Health care system in Japan|Healthcare]] *[[:en:Empire of Japan|Imperial history]] *[[:en:History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] *[[:en:Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] *[[Military history of Japan|Military history]] *[[Naval history of Japan|Naval history]] *[[Post-occupation Japan|Post-Japanese occupation history]]
| ethnooverride = Japanese people | ethnotopics = *[[:en:Japanese people|Japanese]] *[[:en:Koreans in Japan|Zainichi Koreans]] *[[:en:Ainu people|Ainu]] *[[:en:Ōbeikei Islanders|Ōbeikei Islanders]] *[[Yamato people|Yamato]] *[[Ryukyuan people|Ryukuyuans]]
| langoverride = Languages of Japan | langtopics = *[[:en:Japonic languages|Japonic]] *[[:en:Japanese language|Japanese]] *[[Ryukyuan languages|Ryukyuan]] *[[Hachijō language|Hachijō]] *[[:en:Ainu languages|Ainu]] *[[:en:Japanese writing system|Writing system]] *[[Japanese Sign Language]]
| tradoverride = Traditions | tradtopics = *[[:en:Japanese clothing|Clothing]] *[[:en:Etiquette in Japan|Etiquette]] *[[:en:Japanese funeral|Funerals]] *[[List of traditional Japanese games|Games]] *[[:en:Geisha|Geisha]] *[[Wasōbon]] *[[Marriage in Japan|Marriage]] *[[Onsen]]{{\}}[[Sentō]] *[[:en:Japanese tea ceremony|Tea ceremony]] *[[:en:Japanese values|Values]]
| mythoverride = Japanese mythology | mythtopics = *[[List of Japanese deities|Deities]] *[[List of legendary creatures from Japan|Legendary creatures]] *[[:en:Japanese urban legend|Urban legends]] *[[:en:Japanese folktales|Folktales]]
| cuisoverride = Japanese cuisine | cuistopics = *[[History of Japanese cuisine|Food history]] *[[List of Japanese ingredients|Ingredients]] *[[List of Japanese dishes|Dishes]]
| festoverride = Japanese festivals | festtopics = *[[Bon (festival)|Obon]] *[[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] *[[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hinamatsuri]] *[[:en:Buddha's Birthday|Buddha's Birthday]] *[[Tanabata]] *[[Shichi-Go-San]] *[[Cultural festival (Japan)|Cultural festivals]] *[[Japanese New Year]]
| reltopics = *[[:en:Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] *[[:en:Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] *[[:en:Japanese new religions|New religions]] *[[Shinto]]
| artoverride = Japanese art | arttopics = *[[:en:Bonsai|Bonsai]] *[[:en:Japanese garden|Gardens]] *[[:en:Ikebana|Ikebana]] *[[Japanese pottery and porcelain|Pottery and porcelain]]
| litoverride = Japanese literature | littopics = *[[Light novel]] *[[Manga]] *[[:en:Japanese poetry|Poetry]]
| paoverride = Theatre of Japan | patopics = *[[:en:J-pop|J-pop]] *[[:en:Anison|Anison]] *[[:en:Kayōkyoku|Kayōkyoku]] *[[Noh]]
| mediaoverride = Media of Japan | mediatopics = *[[:en:Anime|Anime]] *[[Media mix]] *[[Japanese mobile phone culture|Mobile phone culture]] *[[Video games in Japan|Video games]] *[[Pornography in Japan|Pornography]]
| sporttopics = *[[Sumo in Japan|Sumo]] *[[:en:Baseball in Japan|Baseball]] *[[:en:Football in Japan|Association football]] *[[:en:Japanese martial arts|Martial arts]] *[[:en:Basketball in Japan|Basketball]] *[[Ice hockey in Japan|Ice hockey]] *[[:en:American football in Japan|American football]] *[[Rugby union in Japan|Rugby union]] *[[Japan at the Olympics|Olympics]]
| monutopics = *[[:en:Japanese architecture|Architecture]] *[[:en:Cultural Landscape (Japan)|Cultural Landscapes]] *[[:en:Cultural Property (Japan)|Cultural Properties]] *[[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures]]

| histoverride = Japanese history | histtopics = *[[:en:Japanese era name|Era names]] *[[:en:Demographics of Japan|Demographics]] *[[:en:Japanese currency|Historical currency]] *[[:en:Economic history of Japan|Economic history]] *[[:en:History of education in Japan|Education]], [[:en:History of science and technology in Japan|Science, and Technology]] *[[Health care system in Japan|Healthcare]] *[[:en:Empire of Japan|Imperial history]] *[[:en:History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] *[[:en:Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] *[[:en:Military history of Japan|Military history]] *[[:en:Naval history of Japan|Naval history]] *[[:en:Post-occupation Japan|Post-Japanese occupation history]]
| ethnooverride = Japanese people | ethnotopics = *[[:en:Japanese people|Japanese]] *[[:en:Koreans in Japan|Zainichi Koreans]] *[[:en:Ainu people|Ainu]] *[[:en:Ōbeikei Islanders|Ōbeikei Islanders]] *[[:en:Yamato people|Yamato]] *[[:en:Ryukyuan people|Ryukuyuans]]
| langoverride = Languages of Japan | langtopics = *[[:en:Japonic languages|Japonic]] *[[:en:Japanese language|Japanese]] *[[Ryukyuan languages|Ryukyuan]] *[[Hachijō language|Hachijō]] *[[:en:Ainu languages|Ainu]] *[[:en:Japanese writing system|Writing system]] *[[Japanese Sign Language]]
| tradoverride = Traditions | tradtopics = *[[:en:Japanese clothing|Clothing]] *[[:en:Etiquette in Japan|Etiquette]] *[[:en:Japanese funeral|Funerals]] *[[List of traditional Japanese games|Games]] *[[:en:Geisha|Geisha]] *[[:en:Wasōbon|Wasōbon]] *[[:en:Marriage in Japan|Marriage]] *[[:en:Onsen|Onsen]]{{\}}[[:en:Sentō|Sentō]] *[[:en:Japanese tea ceremony|Tea ceremony]] *[[:en:Japanese values|Values]]
| mythoverride = Japanese mythology | mythtopics = *[[:en:List of Japanese deities|Deities]] *[[:en:List of legendary creatures from Japan|Legendary creatures]] *[[:en:Japanese urban legend|Urban legends]] *[[:en:Japanese folktales|Folktales]]
| cuisoverride = Japanese cuisine | cuistopics = *[[History of Japanese cuisine|Food history]] *[[List of Japanese ingredients|Ingredients]] *[[:en:List of Japanese dishes|Dishes]]
| festoverride = Japanese festivals | festtopics = *[[Bon (festival)|Obon]] *[[:en:Coming of Age Day|Coming of Age Day]] *[[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hinamatsuri]] *[[:en:Buddha's Birthday|Buddha's Birthday]] *[[:en:Tanabata|Tanabata]] *[[Shichi-Go-San]] *[[Cultural festival (Japan)|Cultural festivals]] *[[Japanese New Year]]
| reltopics = *[[:en:Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] *[[:en:Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] *[[:en:Japanese new religions|New religions]] *[[Shinto]]
| artoverride = Japanese art | arttopics = *[[:en:Bonsai|Bonsai]] *[[:en:Japanese garden|Gardens]] *[[:en:Ikebana|Ikebana]] *[[Japanese pottery and porcelain|Pottery and porcelain]]
| litoverride = Japanese literature | littopics = *[[:en:Light novel|Light novel]] *[[:en:Manga|Manga]] *[[:en:Japanese poetry|Poetry]]
| paoverride = Theatre of Japan | patopics = *[[:en:J-pop|J-pop]] *[[:en:Anison|Anison]] *[[:en:Kayōkyoku|Kayōkyoku]] *[[:en:Noh|Noh]]
| mediaoverride = Media of Japan | mediatopics = *[[:en:Anime|Anime]] *[[Media mix]] *[[Japanese mobile phone culture|Mobile phone culture]] *[[:en:Video games in Japan|Video games]] *[[Pornography in Japan|Pornography]]
| sporttopics = *[[Sumo in Japan|Sumo]] *[[:en:Baseball in Japan|Baseball]] *[[:en:Football in Japan|Association football]] *[[:en:Japanese martial arts|Martial arts]] *[[:en:Basketball in Japan|Basketball]] *[[Ice hockey in Japan|Ice hockey]] *[[:en:American football in Japan|American football]] *[[:en:Rugby union in Japan|Rugby union]] *[[Japan at the Olympics|Olympics]]
| monutopics = *[[:en:Japanese architecture|Architecture]] *[[:en:Cultural Landscape (Japan)|Cultural Landscapes]] *[[:en:Cultural Property (Japan)|Cultural Properties]] *[[:en:National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures]]
| orgtopics = *[[Japanese museums|Museums]]
}}<noinclude> {{clear}}

</noinclude>
